title: 100Pcs Colorful Fabric Butterflies for Crafts, Mini 3D Butterfly Decorations, Craft Butterflies, Organza Butterfly Stickers for Crafts, DIY Jewelry Scrapbooking Hair Clip Decorations
features: 1.SYMBOL OF BEAUTY: Craft butterflies symbolize joy, transformation, and creativity. These delicate butterfly decorations bring a touch of nature’s elegance to your DIY projects, inspiring artistic expression
2.100PCS BUTTERFLY DECORATIONS: Includes colorful charming styles of fabric butterflies for crafts, totaling 100pcs—perfect for bulk crafting
3.PERFECT SIZE: Each butterfly sticker for crafts measures approx. 45x32mm (1.77x1.26inch), ideal for detailed work on scrapbooks, cards, or home décor without overwhelming your design
4.PREMIUM FABRIC MATERIAL: Made from high-quality polyester fabric, these craft butterflies are lightweight, fade-resistant, and durable—ensuring long-lasting beauty for your creations
5.VERSATILE USE: Decorate hair accessories, gift boxes, wall art, or even fashion brooches with these butterfly stickers for crafts. Unleash your creativity with endless possibilities
description: Fabric Butterflies for Crafts – Beautiful Butterfly Decorations! ﻿ Enhance your DIY projects with these charming fabric butterflies for crafts! Perfect for scrapbooking, card making, home décor, and more, these delicate butterfly decorations add a whimsical touch to any creation. Made from high-quality fabric, these craft butterflies are lightweight, durable, and easy to attach with glue or stitching. ﻿ Ideal for embellishing gifts, party decorations, or mixed-media art, these butterfly stickers for crafts bring a pop of color and elegance. Whether you're a crafter, teacher, or DIY enthusiast, these fabric butterflies inspire creativity. Get yours today and let your imagination take flight! ﻿ [Note: Actual product may vary slightly in color or size.]
